title: Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
description: The CKA exam certifies that you have the skills, knowledge, and competency to perform the responsibilities of a Kubernetes administrator. Covers cluster architecture, workloads, services, networking, storage, and troubleshooting.

title: AWS Certified DevOps Engineer – Professional
description: Validates technical expertise in provisioning, operating, and managing distributed application systems on the AWS platform. Covers SDLC automation, configuration management, monitoring and logging, policies and standards automation, incident and event response, and high availability and fault tolerance.
prerequisites: 2+ years provisioning and operating AWS environments
Experience with CI/CD pipelines on AWS

domains.name: Configuration Management and Infrastructure as Code
High Availability, Fault Tolerance, and Disaster Recovery
